hard_stops.logic: property information is required before insurance risk analysis can proceed
one or more coverage gaps exist — property is exposed to uninsured loss
insurance coverage does not meet lender requirements — loan covenant violation
property is in a flood zone without flood insurance — federal and lender requirement

soft_flags.logic: one or more policies expire within 90 days — begin renewal process
replacement cost gap exceeds 10% — property may be underinsured
claims in the last 12 months exceed 1.5x the prior period — loss trend may affect premiums
insurance premium exceeds 110% of budget — review coverage or seek competitive quotes
